title.en: ISO 14971:2024 Amendment 1 -- Risk Management for Medical Devices
title.zh: ISO 14971:2024 修正案1 -- 医疗器械风险管理

summary.en: ISO published Amendment 1 to ISO 14971:2019, addressing alignment with the latest EU MDR requirements and clarifying risk acceptability criteria. The amendment introduces updated guidance on benefit-risk analysis methodology and integration with post-market surveillance data. Transition period ends December 2026.
summary.zh: ISO 发布了 ISO 14971:2019 的修正案1，旨在与最新的 EU MDR 要求保持一致，并澄清了风险可接受性标准。修正案引入了更新的获益-风险分析方法指导以及与上市后监督数据的整合。过渡期至2026年12月结束。
